projects.title: FEA: Structural Analysis of a Beam
projects.summary: Static structural analysis to study deflection and von Mises stress distribution under applied loads.

projects.title: FEA: Thermal Analysis of an Assembly
projects.summary: Steady-state thermal analysis to evaluate temperature gradients and heat flow.
highlights: Material properties and thermal boundary conditions

projects.title: CAD: Nissan GT-R Model
projects.summary: SolidWorks-based 3D modelling of a Nissan GT-R model with emphasis on accurate geometry, part organization, and assembly-ready components.
highlights: Assembly structure with named parts for easy export
Exportable drawings and clean surface finishing

projects.title: CAD: V6 Engine Assembly
projects.summary: A complete assembly of a V6 engine designed in SolidWorks to understand the mechanism of how power is produced in automotive vehicles.
highlights: Lower Block & Internals: Pistons, crankshaft, and oil pan
Cylinder Head & Valvetrain: Camshaft and valve timing understanding
Air & Exhaust: Intake manifold, turbo/air routing, and exhaust path

projects.title: CAD: Parametric Bracket Design
projects.summary: Parametric CAD model with configurable dimensions and assembly-ready part design.

projects.title: CAD: 3D Model of a Mechanism
projects.summary: Concept and modeling of a mechanical mechanism with assembly-level components.
